name: chunk-skew-fintech-poc
description: Knowledge repo and standalone React/Vite POC for build version skew, stale chunk recovery, safe refresh, and fintech workflow safety.

scripts.test:learning: playwright test tests/project-contract.spec.ts tests/api-client.spec.ts tests/cognitive-complexity.spec.ts tests/privacy.spec.ts tests/simple-patterns.spec.ts tests/update-policy.spec.ts tests/version-skew.spec.ts --project=chromium --grep "project contract stays standalone and fake-data only|api client sends fintech mutation metadata headers|cognitive complexity scan|privacy redaction|Baseline app loads|simple version skew patterns|update policy decisions|Simple examples page teaches core patterns|Simple examples reset controls fit mobile width|Simple examples reset path works by keyboard|Start page routes payment recovery|Simple examples prepare setup-dependent robust examples|Guided scenario banner returns|Persistent lab controls dock changes simulation state|Reset simulation state clears"
